Generated code calls a provider as a package-qualified function, so an
unexported provider is rejected.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

type Thing struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func newThing() *Thing { return &Thing{} }
-- want/diags --
error: shared/shared.go:5:1: //fabrik:provider function newThing must be exported
  help: capitalize the function name so generated code can call it
